bundleDiscount.typeExplanation: If you select 'percentage', the discount amount will be reduced by the percentage of the total price you entered.
bundleDiscount.typeExplanation2: If you select 'fixed amount', the discount amount will be a fixed number, deducted directly from the price.
bundleDiscount.description: Here you can set up class bundles that offer students a discounted rate per lesson when they purchase a certain number of classes. This encourages bulk purchases and helps you fill your schedule.
bundleDiscount.numOfLessonExplanation: Number of Classes - The minimum number of classes the student must purchase to qualify for this bundle.
bundleDiscount.discountExplanation: Discount - The discount students will receive on each individual lesson within this bundle. For example, '10' would mean 10% off each lesson if 'percentage' is selected.
bundleDiscount.confirmDeleteBundle: Are you sure you want to delete this bundle discount?
